sigWerErrors.reason: 'Artı' means 'plus' in Turkish and is used to indicate the '+' sign before the country code. '+90' is the correct way to write the country code, so this is a semantically equivalent substitution.

The '90' is not actually deleted; it is present in both expected and actual after the country code indicator. The difference is only in how the country code is represented, so there is no real deletion here.
